title: Official Canadian residential property evidence and income
description: The broad RPPI is an inactive six-CMA history ending in 2021 Q4. Active condominium series cover new apartments only and are not spliced to it.
plainLanguageSummary: The broad RPPI is an inactive six-CMA history ending in 2021 Q4. Active condominium series cover new apartments only and are not spliced to it.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: The broad RPPI is an inactive six-CMA history ending in 2021 Q4. Active condominium series cover new apartments only and are not spliced to it.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: The broad RPPI is an inactive six-CMA history ending in 2021 Q4. Active condominium series cover new apartments only and are not spliced to it.
sourceNotes: Derived from Statistics Canada; Statistics Canada
